name: Bavarian Liverwurst Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the liverwurst and sour cream until smooth and creamy.
2. Add all the remaining ingredients, blending well.
3. May be served at room temperature or chilled.
4. Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Cucumbers, Cherry Tomatoes, Radishes, Asparagus, Cocktail Rye Bread, Lavash Crackers.
